🌿 Why Choose Us

The HIMSARU Promise

🏔

Sourced at Altitude

Products from 1500m+ Himalayan farms, harvested at peak freshness and nutrition by local artisans.

🌿

Zero Chemicals, Ever

No pesticides, preservatives, or artificial additives. Just nature's purest form — exactly as the mountains intended.

👩‍🌾

Community Powered

Every purchase directly supports artisans and farmers from Uttarakhand villages. You buy, they thrive.

🤝

Founder-Backed Quality

Co-founders personally verify every batch. WhatsApp them directly if you ever have a question.

💬 Customer Love

Mountain Love Letters

★★★★★

📖 Our Story

Born in the Mountains

HIMSARU was founded by Vishal and Ajay — two sons of Uttarakhand who grew up watching their mountains produce the purest food on earth, yet go unrecognised.

Their mission: bring authentic Pahadi products directly from Himalayan artisans to Indian homes. No middlemen, no compromise.

📬 Stay Connected

Get updates on new products, seasonal specials & Pahadi recipes.

🏔 HIMSARU — Him + Saru

"Him" for the eternal Himalayan snows, "Saru" for the sacred cedar trees.

🏔
HIMSARU

Pure Taste of the Himalayas — Crafted by the people of Uttarakhand, delivered with mountain love.

© 2025 HIMSARU.

🏔 Proudly Made in Uttarakhand
2025Founded with Love
🌿 Our Story

Born in the Mountains,
Made with Love

HIMSARU was born from a deep love for Uttarakhand — its land, its people, and its age-old traditions. "Him" for the eternal snows, "Saru" for the sacred cedar trees blanketing these mountains.

Our startup was founded by Vishal and Ajay — young men from Uttarakhand who dreamed of bringing authentic Pahadi flavors to every Indian home while creating livelihoods for mountain artisans.

Every jar of ghee, every grain of Pisyu Loon, every drop of honey is crafted using traditional methods passed down through generations. No shortcuts. No compromises. Pure mountain goodness.

🌿

100% Natural

Zero chemicals, preservatives, or artificial additives. Ever.

🏔

Mountain Origins

Sourced from pristine valleys and peaks of the Himalayas.

👩‍🌾

Community Powered

Every product crafted by local artisans of Uttarakhand.

💚

Community First

Every purchase directly supports Pahadi families.

📖 Journey

The HIMSARU Story

2023

The Dream Takes Shape

Vishal and Ajay, growing up in Uttarakhand, realised the world deserves to taste the purity their mountains produce.

2024

The First Batches

Working with local artisans, the first batches of A2 Badri Ghee and Pisyu Loon are crafted. The mountains had spoken.

2025

HIMSARU is Born

HIMSARU officially launches with authentic Pahadi products and a promise — pure, uncompromised, Himalayan goodness.

Future

Growing the Mountain Family

Expanding to more products, more artisans, and a national distribution network.

🤝 Leadership

The Co-Founders

Vishal Kohli
Co-Founder & CEO

A proud son of Uttarakhand driving HIMSARU's vision and operations from the ground up.

Ajay Aryan
Co-Founder & CMO

Born in a small Pahadi village, Ajay brings authentic storytelling and brand passion to HIMSARU.

🤝 Partnership

Become a Distributor

Why Partner with HIMSARU?

Be part of a purpose-driven startup delivering 100% authentic Pahadi products and building a loyal customer base across India.

  • Exclusive territory rights for your region
  • Attractive margins and growth incentives
  • Marketing & promotional support provided
  • Direct access to fresh authentic Pahadi products
  • Training & onboarding assistance
  • Growing brand with strong community following
